title: lathyrus collae
intro: Lathyrus collae, also known as the 'chickling pea' or 'chickling vetch', is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the pea family. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lathyrus collae include reducing inflammation and pain, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of Lathyrus collae can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
